mapper.select: SELECT cate_id AS cateId, parent_cate_id AS parentCateId, cate_name AS cateName, cate_sort AS cateSort FROM tb_category WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_cate_id, cate_sort, cate_id

SELECT g.goods_id AS goodsId, g.cate_id AS categoryId, c.cate_name AS categoryName, g.merchant_id AS merchantId, m.merchant_name AS merchantName, m.shop_logo AS merchantLogo, m.shop_intro AS merchantIntro, m.shop_score AS merchantScore, m.shop_score AS merchantServiceScore, m.shop_score AS merchantLogisticsScore, g.goods_name AS goodsName, g.goods_intro AS goodsIntro, g.goods_pic AS goodsPic, g.goods_video AS goodsVideo, g.sell_count AS sellCount, g.comment_count AS commentCount, g.goods_score AS goodsScore, MIN(s.price) AS minPrice, MAX(s.price) AS maxPrice, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(s.stock - s.lock_stock, 0)), 0) AS totalStock FROM tb_goods g LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON c.cate_id = g.cate_id LEFT JOIN tb_merchant m ON m.merchant_id = g.merchant_id LEFT JOIN tb_goods_sku s ON s.goods_id = g.goods_id AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE g.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND g.status = 1 AND g.audit_status = 1 AND g.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY g.goods_id, g.cate_id, c.cate_name, g.merchant_id, m.merchant_name, g.goods_name, g.goods_intro, g.goods_pic, g.goods_video, m.shop_logo, m.shop_intro, m.shop_score, g.sell_count, g.comment_count, g.goods_score HAVING COUNT(s.sku_id) > 0

SELECT sku_id AS skuId, sku_name AS skuName, spec_params AS specParams, price, GREATEST(stock - lock_stock, 0) AS stock FROM tb_goods_sku WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sku_id
SELECT pic_id AS picId, pic_url AS picUrl, pic_sort AS picSort FROM tb_goods_pic WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} ORDER BY pic_sort, pic_id

SELECT gc.comment_id AS commentId, gc.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar AS avatar, gc.goods_score AS goodsScore, gc.service_score AS serviceScore, gc.logistics_score AS logisticsScore, gc.comment_content AS commentContent, gc.comment_pic AS commentPic, gc.comment_time AS commentTime FROM tb_goods_comment gc LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = gc.user_id WHERE gc.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND gc.is_valid = 1 ORDER BY gc.is_top DESC, gc.comment_time DESC LIMIT 10
